summary: Completed static code review of React Native HabitGen app - testing 9 new changes. TypeScript compilation PASSES. All 14 test items verified via source code analysis. This is a React Native CLI mobile app - no browser/playwright testing possible.

issues: Journey cards have fixed opacity 0.65 on journeyHeader and journeyFooter regardless of premium status - this affects readability even for premium users

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 - SplashScreen.tsx: Fire emoji (🔥) shown on splash screen at line 39. Android mipmap-* directories contain ic_launcher.png (logo used as app icon) - PASS
Feature 2 - revenuecat.ts: RevenueCat initialized with correct API key 'test_ghPtiGxQAYDDKQKmwpcDeivBIHN' at line 6. Purchases.configure called at line 24 - PASS
Feature 3 - PremiumScreen.tsx: Uses RevenueCatUI.Paywall component from 'react-native-purchases-ui' at line 22-25 with onDismiss, onPurchaseCompleted, onRestoreCompleted callbacks - PASS

Feature 4 - CreateHabitForm.tsx: Uses usePremium() hook at line 29. Premium users see functional difficulty/priority fields (lines 231-254, 292-315). Non-premium see locked fields with opacity 0.45 and paywall trigger (lines 255-285, 316-346) - PASS
Feature 5 - JourneyScreen.tsx: Premium users DON'T see PRO badge/lock icon (conditional at lines 246-251 and 271-274 with !isPremium). Non-premium see locked state - PASS

Feature 6 - AccountScreen.tsx: Premium users see 'Premium Active' with crown emoji (👑) at line 119. Non-premium see 'Upgrade to Premium' with star emoji. User name from user_metadata displayed at line 76 - PASS
Feature 7 - DurationScrollWheel.tsx: Uses onMomentumScrollEnd for precise snap detection at line 39-48. Uses value prop for highlighting at line 55 (isSelected = item === value) - PASS
Feature 8 - theme.ts: Bright vibrant colors implemented - primary #FF2D55 (light line 33) / #FF375F (dark line 57), accent #FF9500 (light line 36) / #FFD60A (dark line 60) - PASS
Feature 9 - AdBanner.tsx: Hidden when isPremium at line 13 (if isPremium return null). Platform-specific layout comments at line 36-38 - PASS
Feature 10 - AuthScreen.tsx: Google OAuth button with Supabase signInWithOAuth at lines 64-81 with correct client_id. Email verification flow with verify screen at lines 125-170 - PASS

Feature 11 - TimerScreen.tsx: Break button system implemented (lines 143-147 handleTakeBreak). Slot-based breaks at 30-min intervals (line 55-57, 122-123). Break pauses timer (useEffect at 92-117 checks !isOnBreak). Break countdown screen at lines 189-205 - PASS
Feature 12 - FocusOverlay.tsx: Modern iPhone-style with dark theme (#000 at line 92), rotating ring animation (lines 47-54, 85-113), allowed/blocked apps display (lines 133-149) - PASS
Feature 13 - Bundle ID: com.starktechstudio.habitgen in build.gradle namespace (line 80) and applicationId (line 82). MainActivity.kt package declaration at line 1 - PASS
Feature 14 - TabNavigator.tsx: Android-specific padding - 68px height at line 32, 12px bottomPadding at line 31 - PASS

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this React Native app
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 14 test items verified in source code, TypeScript compiles clean

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native CLI mobile app at /app/HabitGen. No web server runs - testing is via TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) and static code review. All 9 new changes (14 test items) implemented correctly. MOCKED APIs: RevenueCat (test key), Google AdMob (placeholder), Screen Lock (UI overlay only - uses AppState listener).

mocked_integrations.RevenueCat: revenuecat.ts - initialized with test API key test_ghPtiGxQAYDDKQKmwpcDeivBIHN. PremiumScreen uses RevenueCatUI.Paywall
mocked_integrations.Google AdMob: admob.ts - placeholder with test ad unit IDs, no actual SDK integrated
mocked_integrations.Screen Lock: screenlock.ts - uses AppState listener as UI overlay placeholder, not actual native screen pinning
mocked_integrations.Google OAuth: AuthScreen.tsx - calls Supabase signInWithOAuth with Google client_id, requires actual Supabase project configuration
